segments.text: And calling His twelve disciples to Him, Jesus gave them authority over unclean spirits, so that they could drive them out and heal every disease and sickness.
These are the names of the twelve apostles: first Simon, called Peter, and his brother Andrew; James son of Zebedee, and his brother John;
Philip and Bartholomew; Thomas and Matthew the tax collector; James son of Alphaeus, and Thaddaeus;
Simon the Zealot,[^60] and Judas Iscariot, who betrayed Jesus.[^61]
These twelve Jesus sent out with the following instructions:
Do not go onto the road of the Gentiles or enter any town of the Samaritans.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Go rather to the lost sheep of Israel.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: As you go, preach this message: ‘The kingdom of heaven is near.’
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Heal the sick, raise the dead, cleanse the lepers,[^62] drive out demons. Freely you have received; freely give.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Do not carry any gold or silver or copper in your belts.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Take no bag for the road, or second tunic, or sandals, or staff; for the worker is worthy of his provisions.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Whatever town or village you enter, find out who is worthy there and stay at his house[^63] until you move on.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: As you enter the home, greet its occupants.[^64]
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: If the home is worthy, let your peace rest on it; but if it is not, let your peace return to you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And if anyone will not welcome you or heed your words, shake the dust off your feet when you leave that home or town.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text:
Truly I tell you, it will be more bearable for Sodom and Gomorrah on the day of judgment than for that town.

## Sheep among Wolves
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Behold, I am sending you out like sheep among wolves; therefore be as shrewd as snakes and as innocent as doves.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But beware of men; for they will hand you over to their councils and flog you in their synagogues.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: On My account, you will be brought before governors and kings as witnesses to them and to the Gentiles.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But when they hand you over, do not worry about how to respond or what to say. In that hour you will be given what to say.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: For it will not be you speaking, but the Spirit of your Father speaking through you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Brother will betray brother to death, and a father his child; children will rise against their parents and have them put to death.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: You will be hated by everyone because of My name, but the one who perseveres to the end will be saved.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: When they persecute you in one town, flee to the next. Truly I tell you, you will not reach all the towns of Israel before the Son of Man comes.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: A disciple is not above his teacher, nor a servant above his master.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text:
It is enough for a disciple to be like his teacher, and a servant like his master. If the head of the house has been called Beelzebul,[^65] how much more the members of his household!

## Fear God Alone
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: So do not be afraid of them. For there is nothing concealed that will not be disclosed, and nothing hidden that will not be made known.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: What I tell you in the dark, speak in the daylight; what is whispered in your ear, proclaim from the housetops.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Do not be afraid of those who kill the body but cannot kill the soul. Instead, fear the One who can destroy both soul and body in hell.[^66]
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Are not two sparrows sold for a penny?[^67] Yet not one of them will fall to the ground apart from the will of your Father.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And even the very hairs of your head are all numbered.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text:
So do not be afraid; you are worth more than many sparrows.

## Confessing Christ
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Therefore everyone who confesses Me before men, I will also confess him before My Father in heaven.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text:
But whoever denies Me before men, I will also deny him before My Father in heaven.

## Not Peace but a Sword
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Do not assume that I have come to bring peace to the earth; I have not come to bring peace, but a sword.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text:
For I have come to turn
‘a man against his father, a daughter against her mother,
a daughter-in-law against her mother-in-law.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: A man’s enemies will be the membersof his own household.’[^68]
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Anyone who loves his father or mother more than Me is not worthy of Me; anyone who loves his son or daughter more than Me is not worthy of Me;
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: and anyone who does not take up his cross and follow Me is not worthy of Me.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text:
Whoever finds his life will lose it, and whoever loses his life for My sake will find it.

## The Reward of Service
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: He who receives you receives Me, and he who receives Me receives the One who sent Me.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Whoever receives a prophet because he is a prophet will receive a prophet’s reward, and whoever receives a righteous man because he is a righteous man will receive a righteous man’s reward.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And if anyone gives even a cup of cold water to one of these little ones because he is My disciple, truly I tell you, he will never lose his reward.
segments.speaker: Jesus
